payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: White-painted rectangular picture frame containing a small colorful beach-scene print (orange/yellow umbrella over blue sea) with a thin inner mat; frame shows minor scuffs and is partially edge-cropped in the image — estimated camera distance ~1.2 m.
